# Uptake Agency

> Technology consulting and AI solutions firm founded in 2024, based in Istanbul, Turkey, serving clients worldwide.

## About
Uptake Agency is a technology consulting firm specializing in AI integration, custom software development, automation, and infrastructure engineering. Founded by Cengiz Selcuk with 15+ years of experience and enterprise partnerships with Intel, NVIDIA, and MSI.

## Services
- AI Consulting: Custom LLM solutions, RAG systems, intelligent automation, strategy assessment
- Custom Software Development: Full-stack web apps, APIs, platforms (TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Python)
- Automation & Integration: Workflow automation, CRM sync, WhatsApp Business API, multi-channel platforms
- Infrastructure & DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, monitoring, security hardening

## Key Projects
- Estanbul AI Agent: Multi-channel AI customer service (70% faster response, 85% auto-resolution)
- ARU: WhatsApp Business CRM & automation SaaS
- OEMBuilder: AI-powered PC build visualization for MSI (Gemini, FastAPI)
- Quix: Real-time multiplayer quiz platform (sub-100ms response)
- Quill: AI-powered system-wide technical dictionary (Swift, Rust/Tauri)

## Stats
- 15+ years experience
- $2M+ revenue generated
- 4 enterprise partners (Intel, NVIDIA, MSI, Praxilla)
- 50+ projects delivered

## Contact
- Email: info@uptakeagency.com
- Location: Istanbul, Turkey | Serving clients worldwide
- Website: https://uptakeagency.com
